message:
fix: display custom_paths packs in `dcg packs` listing (closes #57)

The packs listing command correctly loaded external packs from
custom_paths for JSON output but the rich-output and fallback display
paths only showed built-in packs from the REGISTRY.

- Non-rich fallback: iterate over pack_list (which includes external
  packs) instead of the built-in-only infos vec
- Rich output: add a separate "custom" section that displays external
  packs loaded from custom_paths via get_external_packs()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
